# Method Commentor
## Instruction
With C# code provided, generate comments for each method in the code. The comments should explain the purpose of the method, its parameters, and its return value (if any). Ensure that the comments are clear and concise, making it easier for other developers to understand the functionality of each method.
## Example```csharp
public class Calculator
{
    /// <summary>Adds two integers and returns the result.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="a">The first integer to add.</param>
    /// <param name="b">The second integer to add.</param>
    /// <returns>The sum of the two integers.</returns>
    public int Add(int a, int b)  
    {
        return a + b;
    }
}```
In this example, the `Add` method is commented to explain that it adds two integers and returns the result. The parameters `a` and `b` are described as the integers to be added, and the return value is described as the sum of the two integers.
## Usage
To use the Method Commentor skill, simply provide your C# code with methods that you want to  comment. The AI will analyze the code and generate appropriate comments for each method, making it easier for you and other developers to understand the code's functionality.
